templates.name: api_topaz_image_enhance
templates.title: Topaz: Image Enhance
templates.description: Professional image enhancement using Topaz's Reimagine model with face enhancement and detail restoration.

templates.name: api_topaz_video_enhance
templates.title: Topaz Astra: Video Creative Upscale
templates.description: Enhance videos with Topaz AI. Supports resolution upscaling using Starlight (Astra) Fast model and frame interpolation with apo-8 model.

templates.name: api_stability_upscale_fast
templates.title: Stability AI: Image Upscale fast
templates.description: Upload an image to quickly upscale it 4x via the Stability AI API, ideal for enhancing low-quality or compressed images.

templates.name: api_wavespped_seedvr2_ai_image_fix
templates.title: WaveSpeed: AI Image Restoration with SeedVR2
templates.description: Upload an AI-generated image to restore details and upscale. The workflow preserves colors and sharpness while minimizing artifacts. Output is a high-quality, enlarged version of your input.

templates.name: api_wavespped_image_upscale
templates.title: WaveSpeed: Image Upscale
templates.description: Upload an image to upscale its resolution. Generate an enhanced 2K, 4K, or 8K output that preserves details and reduces artifacts in JPEG, PNG, or WEBP format.

templates.name: api_wavespeed_flshvsr_video_upscale
templates.title: WaveSpeed: FlashVSR Video Upscale
templates.description: Upload a video to upscale it to 720p, 1080p, 2K, or 4K. The workflow enhances detail, reduces artifacts, and ensures consistent motion for a high-quality, natural-looking output.

templates.name: api_vidu_video_extension
templates.title: Vidu: Video Extension
templates.description: Upload a video and use the Vidu Q2 model to extend it up to 7 seconds and enhance the resolution to 1080p.

templates.name: api_magnific_image_relight
templates.title: Magnific: Image Relight
templates.description: Upload a source image and a reference lighting image. Generate a relit version of your source image, applying the lighting conditions from the reference.

templates.name: api_magnific_skin_enhancer
templates.title: Magnific: Skin Enhancer
templates.description: Enhance skin and overall image quality by uploading your image and selecting a preset to adjust lighting, color grading, and realism.

templates.name: api_bfl_flux1_expand_image
templates.title: Flux.1: Image Outpainting
templates.description: Upload an image to expand its canvas using Flux.1. Generate an outpainted image with extended content.
